desc: Merge adjacent dimension strings into one, preserving every anchor Reference.
summary: Merge adjacent dimension strings into one, preserving every anchor Reference.
usecase: Cleaning up multiple collinear dimensions into a single running dimension for drawing presentation.
precondition: Active document open; active view is a View; at least two Dimension ids supplied.
postcondition: One new Dimension added; input Dimensions deleted. One committed Transaction.
logictree: 1) Resolver_DimensionIdsCsv → list of ids (≥ 2). 2) Resolve each to a Dimension on the active view; validate at least two survive. Else WireError + abort. 3) Open Transaction 'Merge dimension strings'. 4) Order by curve start-X; collect each dimension's References into a single ReferenceArray; pick the first dimension's line as the merged dimension line. 5) merged = doc.Create.NewDimension(view, line, refs). 6) Delete every original dimension. 7) Commit. 8) Bot JSON / User toast. 9) Exception → tracker.Fail + WireFault.

thinkingsteps: Creating merged dimension and deleting originals…
